note: BRAIN layer — value delivery queue. Three INTERESTED leads active. Lead 3 (Claire) call is TOMORROW at 14:00 — audit must be complete and proposal ready before EOD today. Leads 22 (Rob) and 1 (Tom) awaiting responses to replies sent yesterday. Monitor throughout the day.

items.new_pain_point_discovered: No online booking system — self-reported lost customers
items.reply_summary: Confirmed Tuesday 2pm call. Volunteered booking gap as biggest issue.

audit_tasks.notes: Identify 2 free/low-cost booking options suitable for a small hair salon: Fresha (free, salon-specific) and Calendly (simple, flexible). Include pricing, key features, setup time in proposal.

option_a.name: Quick Fix
option_a.notes: Present as baseline only — not the natural recommendation

option_b.name: Full Fix (recommended)
option_b.scope: SSL + mobile + booking widget integration (Fresha or Calendly) + above-fold CTA rewrite
option_b.notes: Claire identified the booking gap herself — this is the likely conversion. Lead with this option.

call_prep_notes: Claire's self-identified pain: 'we lose people all the time because there's no way to book online' — open the call by validating this observation
Do NOT anchor on SSL first — she's moved beyond that. Lead with the booking solution
Fresha is free for the salon and charges a per-booking fee to customers — low friction to propose
Know her competitor landscape (top 3 Leeds salons ranking above her) — use this to show urgency
Two proposals: let her choose, but make Option B the obvious default

items.reply_summary: Asked whether SSL/mobile can be bundled into full redesign. Upsell signal — 'sort the whole thing in one go'.

option_b.name: Full Redesign Bundle
option_b.scope: New design + SSL + mobile + contact form + portfolio gallery

option_c.name: Redesign + Ongoing SEO
option_c.scope: Option B + monthly local SEO ('print shop Sowerby Bridge')

items.nudge_trigger: If no response from Rob by EOD 2026-04-07 (Tuesday), send: 'Happy to send a one-page scope doc if that makes it easier to confirm, Rob.'

items.new_pain_point_discovered: No online quote form — customers told to ring instead
items.reply_summary: Acknowledged the quote gap, said he's been meaning to sort it. Asked for pricing.

audit_tasks.notes: Identify 1-2 examples of similar local carpentry business sites with good quote request forms. Links or screenshots. Sent with pricing reply.

items.nudge_trigger: If no call booking or reply from Tom by EOD 2026-04-08 (Tuesday), send: 'Tom — happy to jump on a 10-min call Wed morning to confirm the spec if that's easier than email.'

summary.expected_conversions_this_week: 1-2 (lead 3 call tomorrow — high probability; lead 22 scoping in progress)
summary.critical_today: Complete all lead 3 audit tasks before 17:00. Call is at 14:00 TOMORROW.
summary.gdpr_note: All three leads replied voluntarily to cold outreach — legitimate interest basis confirmed. Interactions logged in audit_log.
